places.name: Wendy's Secret Garden
places.description: Built over an abandoned train yard, this hidden gem is full of winding paths and offers gorgeous views of Sydney Harbour.

places.name: 'Forgotten Songs' Sound Sculpture
places.description: A collaboration of art and ornithology mourns the calls of Sydney's lost birds.

places.name: Gould's Book Arcade
places.description: One of Australia's largest secondhand bookstores.

places.name: Museum of Human Disease
places.description: Australian museum dedicated to human health and lack thereof.

places.name: Royal Botanic Gardens, Sydney
places.description: Come for the flowers, stay for the bats!

places.name: Purikura Photoland
places.description: People can't get enough of these adorable Japanese photobooths.

places.name: The Lex and Ruby Graham Gardens
places.description: This secret Australian garden was built on love after a man planted a random bulb he found in the ocean.

places.name: Midden
places.description: In the shadow of the Sydney Opera House, Indigenous ingredients shine.

places.name: The Lillipad Cafe
places.description: An indigenous ethnobotanist runs this brunch spot celebrating Australia’s native flavors.
